mapper.update: UPDATE RELATION SET REL_CLSF = 10 WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND TRIP_CONTS_ID = #{tripContsId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM relation WHERE relClsf = 10 AND trip_conts_id = #{tripContsId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM relation WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND relClsf = 10
SELECT user_no, trip_conts_id, relClsf, reg_dt FROM relation WHERE relClsf = 10 ORDER BY reg_dt DESC
